title: Astrocraft Panorama
description: Cool panorama with stars from mod Astrocraft
body: This resource pack transforms the default Minecraft main menu panorama into an open space background filled with stars. It is designed for players who want a fresh, atmospheric look every time they open the game. By replacing the standard menu view with the vastness of space, it creates a calm yet epic mood before you even start playing. The pack is lightweight, works with all versions that support custom panoramas, and does not affect gameplay — only the menu visuals. Perfect if you enjoy space themes or simply want a unique main menu experience.
